description: This file defines a Retrofit API interface named MockApiService for a demo application. It includes three suspend functions for login, token refresh, and accessing a protected resource, all of which are served by a mock backend interception rather than a real server.

classes.name: MockApiService
classes.description: A Retrofit interface for mock network calls including login, refresh token, and protected resource access.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs a mock login request with a LoginRequest body, returns a TokenResponse.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Performs a token refresh request with a RefreshRequest body, returns a TokenResponse.

methods.name: protectedResource
methods.description: Accesses a protected resource endpoint, returns a ProtectedResponse.
